task_completion.description: Verify that Screaming Frog SEO Spider crawled the target website.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screaming Frog UI showing 'https://crawler-test.com/' in the URL bar at the top, with crawl progress or populated results visible in the main window.

task_completion.description: Verify that the Directives tab is selected in Screaming Frog.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Directives' tab is highlighted/selected in the main Screaming Frog interface, displaying directives data.

task_completion.description: Verify the Directives data was exported to a CSV file in the correct directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file manager, terminal, or text editor showing a CSV file (e.g., directives.csv) located in the '~/Documents/SEO/exports/' directory, or a Screaming Frog save dialog actively saving to this path.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the indexability_report.txt file in the correct directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor open with a file saved at '~/Documents/SEO/reports/indexability_report.txt', or a file manager/terminal showing this file exists.

task_completion.description: Verify the text report contains the total URL count and a breakdown of non-indexable URLs by reason.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The contents of 'indexability_report.txt' showing a total URL count number and a summary/list of reasons why URLs are non-indexable (e.g., using terms like noindex, canonicalised, blocked).

task_completion.description: Verify the text report includes at least 5 specific examples of non-indexable URLs.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The contents of 'indexability_report.txt' listing at least 5 distinct URLs from crawler-test.com that are identified as non-indexable.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually used the Screaming Frog GUI to perform the crawl.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots must show the Screaming Frog application interface in action, not just terminal commands, mocked files, or a web browser.

integrity.description: Verify the report data matches expected output from crawler-test.com and wasn't hallucinated.
integrity.visual_evidence: The URLs listed in the report examples should look like genuine crawler-test.com URLs (e.g., containing paths related to noindex, canonical) and not generic placeholders like 'example.com/page1'.

integrity.description: Verify the CSV export appears to be genuinely generated by Screaming Frog.
integrity.visual_evidence: If the CSV is visible, it should contain standard Screaming Frog column headers (e.g., Address, Indexability, Meta Robots 1, X-Robots-Tag 1) rather than being manually typed or overly simplified.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target website is https://crawler-test.com/, which contains approximately 363 test pages. Valid indexability classification terms used by Screaming Frog include 'noindex', 'canonical' or 'canonicalised', 'indexable' or 'non-indexable', and 'blocked'. The exported Directives CSV should contain columns such as 'Meta Robots 1', 'X-Robots-Tag 1', and 'Indexability'.
